title: Venezuelan Chocolate Torta
description: A rich and decadent dessert that combines the flavors of Venezuela and chocolate. Perfect for special occasions or as a sweet treat.

ingredients.name: Golden Venezuelan chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: High-quality chocolate for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Golden gelato
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite flavor to pair with the chocolate

ingredients.name: Venezuelan arequipe
ingredients.notes: Caramel-like sauce made from milk and sugar

ingredients.name: Golden torta
ingredients.notes: Crumbly, sweet pastry to hold the chocolate and gelato

ingredients.name: Sea salt
ingredients.notes: To balance the sweetness of the chocolate and gelato

instructions: Bake the torta according to the package instructions.
Melt the chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Scoop the gelato into a bowl and top with the melted chocolate.
Drizzle the Venezuelan arequipe over the top of the gelato and chocolate.
Sprinkle sea salt over the top.
